## Meeting Purpose

[Assess the current status of the Good Call account and determine immediate actions needed.](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Good Call account is behind on content delivery (\~60 article backlog) due to recent team changes and transition from freelance to in-house production](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Client (Bob) is primarily focused on domain rating growth and keyword rankings, less concerned about content quality](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Need to verify and implement the correct content generation flow in Atlas for programmatic area code-based content](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Updated reporting and metrics are required for the upcoming client call](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

## Topics

### Account Status and Challenges

  - [Transition from Prateek's management to new team structure](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [\~60 article backlog, delivered 40-45 articles last week instead of expected 60-70](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Previous production relied heavily on external freelancers, now shifting to in-house](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Technical issues on Good Call's end have been resolved](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Client is aware of Prateek's departure but not fully briefed on all changes](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)

### Content Strategy and Client Priorities

  - [Focus on programmatic area code-based information pages](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [Client prioritizes domain rating growth (increased from 20s to 40s) and keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Potential shift towards targeting Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) content, pending client approval](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Mix of programmatic SEO content and some editorial articles](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)

### Production Workflow and Tools

  - [Need to verify the correct content generation flow in Atlas (possibly "V2" or IdealPath)](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Aim to replicate the area code content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Integration with Webflow for direct publishing is a priority task for the dev team](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Potential to leverage Jenny for additional content production support](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)

### Reporting and Client Communication

  - [Updated metrics and reports needed for upcoming client call](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Looker dashboard exists but may need updating](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Marcel to have a call with the client on Wednesday to discuss strategy and changes](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

### Team Responsibilities and Handover

  - [Carrie to review assets and ensure correct information is available in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Matthew to assist with content generation using the verified flow](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Darrell to provide context and direction for client communication](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Need to clarify Martha's ongoing involvement and transition plan](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Verify and implement the correct content generation flow in Atlas for area code content](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

  - [Darrell to brief Marcel before Wednesday's client call](https://fathom.video/share/ZSUGANmsWjBD-x_JV_rvZKQsQ3RqsWd1?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
